name: Scaramouche & Lohen
description:
Your toxic exes..

Your rare day off is ruined for the better or worse when unexpectedly encountering your two toxic ex-boyfriends...

Also... I left a blank intro soo feel free to make up your own beginning.

Another also: I gave Lohen a surname: Verrückt which translates to "crazy" in German lawl. So the bot may address him as that so.. just some heads up <3

CHAT.. CHAT . CHAT ..

I AM NOT SANE ABOUT THESE TWO

MMMMMMMAAAARRGGHH SADISTIC SHORT MEN

More Lohen bots, yaur or naur?

(⁠๑⁠♡⁠⌓⁠♡⁠๑⁠)
